channel.title: Metrics on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Metrics on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Kubernetes v1.36: New Metric for Route Sync in the Cloud Controller Manager
item.description:
Kubernetes v1.36 adds an alpha CCM route-controller metric, route_controller_route_sync_total, which counts cloud route syncs. It is meant to help validate the watch-based route reconciliation feature gate by comparing sync frequency against the existing fixed-interval loop.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: k8s: Kubernetes v1.36: PSI Metrics for Kubernetes Graduates to GA
item.description:
Kubernetes v1.36 graduates PSI metrics to GA for observing CPU, memory, and I/O pressure at node, pod, and container levels. The update also improves metric handling by suppressing zero-valued PSI output when the underlying Linux node does not support PSI.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: k8s: Kubernetes v1.36: Staleness Mitigation and Observability for Controllers
item.description:
Kubernetes v1.36 adds client-go and kube-controller-manager changes to reduce controller actions based on stale caches, and adds metrics for observing cache freshness. The initial rollout targets DaemonSet, StatefulSet, ReplicaSet, and Job controllers, with feature gates available to disable the behavior.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Logical replication slot sync Status metric for Azure PostgreSQL Flexible Server
item.description:
Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server now includes a new Azure Monitor metric, logical_replication_slot_sync_status, in public preview. It reports the synchronization status of logical replication slots.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics now aggregate Copilot cloud agent active user counts
item.description:
GitHub is renaming Copilot coding agent to Copilot cloud agent and updating the data schema to reflect that change. Copilot usage metrics will now aggregate active user counts for the cloud agent under the new naming.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot-reviewed pull request merge metrics now in the usage metrics API
item.description:
The Copilot usage metrics API now includes two new merge metrics for Copilot-reviewed pull requests, extending the pull request throughput and cycle-time metrics added in February. These metrics track PRs reviewed by Copilot from the coding agent.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Container network metrics filtering for AKS
item.description:
Azure Container Networking Services (ACNS) for AKS now supports container network metrics filtering in general availability. This lets operators reduce metric volume and focus on operationally relevant data.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics now includes user-level GitHub Copilot CLI activity
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics now include user-level activity for GitHub Copilot CLI, expanding beyond prior enterprise-level CLI telemetry.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot metrics now includes plan mode
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics now include telemetry for plan mode. Enterprises can track plan mode adoption and engagement alongside existing Copilot metrics.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot metrics reports now return consistent usernames for Enterprise Managed Users
item.description:
Copilot usage metrics reports now return a consistent user_login value for Enterprise Managed Users. This addresses cases where reports previously included a suffixed user_login, complicating analysis.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics now includes enterprise-level GitHub Copilot CLI activity
item.description:
GitHub Copilot enterprise usage metrics now include GitHub Copilot CLI telemetry, expanding what’s counted in enterprise-level reporting.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot metrics is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics are now generally available, providing a centralized view of team adoption and usage.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot metrics report URLs update
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics API download URLs are now served from a new endpoint; report data, API contract, and response schema are unchanged.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Org-level metrics API now includes pull request throughput metric parity
item.description:
GitHub expanded the organization-level Copilot Usage Metrics API to add pull request activity metrics, bringing the org-level endpoints closer to other metrics parity.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Organization-level Copilot usage metrics dashboard available in public preview
item.description:
GitHub has added an organization-level GitHub Copilot usage metrics dashboard in public preview, expanding access beyond enterprise-only dashboards.

  • Source: GitHub
